design_concept: Glassmorphism, Grand Nature Theme, Magazine Editorial Layout

history.task: main page services section - Hero design refined
details: Changed main hook text to '우리는 브랜드를 기획합니다.' and applied brand story text.
Removed square image overlay and applied a Magazine Editorial layout with a clean text block split.
Integrated a high-quality 3D Globe Component instead of a static image for a luxurious, global agency feel.
Optimized Globe visual settings: removed circle border, deepened dot opacity for clarity, expanded to maximum container fit.
Updated DEFAULT_MARKERS mapped across global continents (Seoul, London, Paris, NYC, etc.).

Replaced default city labels with Branding/Marketing core values: Identity, Branding, Strategy, Experience, Performance, Creative, Value, Storytelling, Purpose, Foundation, Core, Philosophy, Vision, Innovation, Impact, Concept, Analysis.
Created an interconnected global web in DEFAULT_CONNECTIONS (23 arcs).
Added a dynamic highlighting feature tracking time: randomly illuminating a specific marker label and connection dot.
Global color scheme updated: Red (#D60000) replaced entirely by Sunset Orange (#E47B41) across components including Header.
Redesigned the entire 'Organisation' section in the About page to a modern, sophisticated tree structure with glassmorphism UI.
Added specific department capabilities & team structures (Marketing, Web, Brand Strategy) based on new PDF insights.
Added detailed core capabilities cards (Consulting, Content, UX/UI) with engaging hover glow-effects and animations.
Refined text to professional marketing copy (e.g., '각 분야별 최고 수준의 시니어급 전문가들이...').
Refined MOT Customer Journey Map with continuous loop representation and connector arrows.

upcoming_state: About Page Structure is locked. Ready to proceed to next steps.
